text: I'm on day 5 of fixing my sleep schedule and it still feels like a battle. But every morning I wake up at 5:30, it's a reminder that I'm one step closer to making my dreams a reality, no matter the pain.
decision_reason: Meets all requirements and is a strong, relatable post.

text: Most people won't tell you that getting back in shape takes sacrifice. I've been back at the gym for a week and it hurts. But I'm doing it because I know the people who make it look easy are the ones who put in the work, even when it's hard.
decision_reason: Empathetic tone and use of social_proof_inverse trigger make it a compelling post.
